channel.title: K1 Version Tracker Feed
channel.description: Recent guide updates for K1 Version Tracker.

item.title: K1 Game Version Name Changed After Install: What to Compare First
item.description: Version-check guide for K1 Game users who install one APK label but then see a different version name inside the app or Android app settings.

item.title: K1 Game Latest Version Source Check: What to Compare First
item.description: Independent version-check guide for comparing K1 Game latest version claims across pages, file labels and update notes before reinstalling.

item.title: K1 Game Version Rollback Check: Should You Go Back?
item.description: A version decision page for users considering whether to roll back from a new K1 Game update to an older APK or route.

item.description: A version hub for K1 Game latest APK checks, changelog reading, update stuck issues and old APK decisions.

item.description: Version guide for Pakistan users checking whether a K1 Game update includes a visible changelog, version label, or silent build change.

item.title: K1 Game Update Stuck on Loading: Version Fix Path
item.description: Troubleshooting page for K1 Game updates that remain stuck on loading after a new APK or H5 refresh.

item.title: K1 Game Update Not Showing: Version Check Guide
item.description: Help users confirm whether a missing update prompt is a real version issue or just cached app state.

item.title: K1 Game Old APK Still Works: Should You Keep It?
item.description: Explains the risks and decision points when an old K1 Game APK still opens but may not match the latest version.

item.title: K1 Game Latest Version Without Reinstall: What Is Possible?
item.description: Explains when K1 Game users may refresh version state without a full reinstall and when a clean install is safer.

item.description: Version-check guide for confirming the latest K1 Game build before login, with changelog questions, FAQ, and update-path links.
